insurance_upsell_card.note_for_dwellium: AppFolio aggressively upsells this to Core-tier customers — indicates insurance tracking is a COMMON PAIN POINT for ZP-Group-sized operators. Dwellium should ship this baseline in the Compliance module.

recent_emails_sample.subject: Important Community Notice: Vehicle Safety Reminder
Paperless Payment Transition & Resident Portal Instructions
Important Update: Changes to Accepted Payment Methods Effective April 30, 2026

dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-RES-01: Occupancy entity is distinct from Tenant entity — one Occupancy has multiple Tenants, each with Type (Primary/Other Occupant) + Status (Current/Past) + Start/End dates. Dwellium's Resident module needs this 1:N structure.
dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-COMM-01: Resident emails are batched community announcements from Ashley Johnson (presumably community manager). C-1 email router should classify these as 'community_broadcast' vs individual tenant correspondence.
dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-AR-01: Monthly charge row shows account, amount, start/end, next/previous dates + status — this is the canonical ledger row for Dwellium's AR module.
dwellium_mapping_notes.GAP-LEASE-03: Late fee policy inherits from property but can be overridden per-tenant. Dwellium lease model must support BOTH.
